title: Replace card-body with card-navigation CSS Class
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the navigation area to have minimal padding and clean styling, so that screen real estate is used efficiently.
description: Replace the `card-body` CSS class with a new `card-navigation` class on navigation elements. The `card-navigation` class removes default padding and other styles inherited from `card-body`, providing a cleaner layout for navigation areas that can be independently styled later.
acceptance_criteria: card-body class is replaced with card-navigation on navigation elements
Padding and unnecessary styles from card-body are removed
Navigation areas render with a cleaner, more compact layout
No visual regressions in other card-body elements
ux_changes: Navigation elements use a new card-navigation CSS class with reduced padding, creating a more compact and clean navigation layout.
implementation_notes: Developer noted that removing card-body styling initially disturbed the layout. Adjustments were made to maintain visual integrity with the new class.
comment_summary: Developer flagged that the style change would disturb existing layout, then resolved the issues and submitted for review.
